description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library вЂ” fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
Discord
Download

> Running on macOS вЂ” the app isn't code-signed, so Gatekeeper quarantines it on first launch. After dragging Noctis into your Applications folder, clear the flag once in Terminal:
>
> xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Noctis.app
>
> Then open Noctis normally.
What's Changed
Fixed
- Fixed stale search in Folders tab
- Fixed drop-imported tracks not appearing in Folders
- Fixed folder selection lost after adding track
- Fixed row-number clipping in Folders
Added
- Added folder search jump-to and highlight
- Added file-readiness gate for Watch-Folders importer
Improved
- Improved folder search to keep track numbers
- Improved album tile sizing in the More by Artist view
Full Changelog: v1.2.8...v1.2.9
